criteria.name: AI Integration Level
criteria.description: Extent to which AI features are incorporated into the app's functionality.

criteria.name: User Engagement
criteria.description: Average time users spend on the app daily.

criteria.name: User Base Size
criteria.description: Total number of active users on the platform.

criteria.name: Feature Diversity
criteria.description: Number of distinct features offered by the app.

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Measures taken to protect user data and privacy.
